name: ipo_allocation
description: an IPO share-allocation world across bids with oversubscription; actions bid, allocate, scale_back

card.description: an IPO share-allocation world across bids with oversubscription; actions bid, allocate, scale_back

rules: 'bid' records or updates a bidder's requested share count and reopens the book, clearing any prior allocation.

'allocate' fills the book: if total demand is at or below shares_offered every bid is filled in full; if oversubscribed each bidder receives floor(requested * shares_offered / total_demand) shares (pro-rata).
'scale_back' reduces a named bidder's allocation by the given shares, returning them to the available pool.
Invariants: oversubscription = total_demand / shares_offered; available = shares_offered - total_allocated; total_allocated never exceeds shares_offered.

emit.report: IPO {status}: offered {shares_offered}, demand {total_demand} ({oversubscription}x); allocated {total_allocated}, {available} left on the table
